codeReview.summary: The wizard-confirmation-step feature is implemented correctly and completely. The worker added a 4th confirmation step to the wizard flow that displays selected segment, problem, and ICP preview. Back navigation preserves all state across all steps. The handleDiscover function now accepts an ICP override parameter to avoid stale state issues. The implementation includes proper double-start guards and resets wizard state after research starts. All 39 tests pass (including 10 new wizard-specific tests) and typecheck is clean.

summary:
Feature PASSES review. The wizard-confirmation-step implementation is complete and correct:

✅ WizardStep type updated to include 'confirm'
✅ handleAdvanceToConfirm() advances from step 3 to confirmation step
✅ Confirmation UI displays segment, problem, and ICP preview correctly
✅ Back buttons preserve state across all 4 steps
✅ handleStartResearch() computes ICP directly and passes to handleDiscover(icp)
✅ handleDiscover() accepts icpDescriptionOverride parameter to avoid stale state
✅ resetWizardState() clears all wizard state after research starts
✅ Double-start guard prevents multiple /api/discover calls
✅ Custom segment/problem inputs flow through correctly to confirmation display
✅ 10 new tests added covering buildIcpDescription and wizard state management
✅ All 39 tests pass, typecheck clean
✅ Browser testing confirmed: wizard flows through all 4 steps correctly, back navigation preserves state, custom inputs display properly

No code quality issues, edge case gaps, or shared state observations identified. The worker followed the fullstack-worker skill procedure correctly.
